sources.title: The New York Ripper 1982
sources.description: A burned-out New York police detective teams up with a college psychoanalyst to track down a vicious serial killer randomly stalking and killing various young women around the city.

metadata.Plot: Killer who talks like a duck wanders around New York City killing women by various means including slicing an eyeball with a razorblade. Detective Jack Headly is hot on his trail.
metadata.Writer: Gianfranco Clerici, Vincenzo Mannino, Lucio Fulci
metadata.Actors: Jack Hedley, Almanta Suska, Howard Ross
